rhodes_2016_grace_huckins: Grace Huckins is a 2016 American Rhodes Scholar elected from Harvard. The Rhodes Scholarship is one of the oldest and most prestigious international scholarship awards, supporting approximately 32 American scholars per year (out of ~880 endorsed applicants) for postgraduate study at the University of Oxford. Rhodes Scholars are typically selected for academic excellence, leadership, and public service potential.
